controls.title: Identification and Authentication Control
controls.description: Identify and authenticate all users (human, software, device) before access.

controls.title: Human user identification and authentication
controls.description: Identify and authenticate all human users.

controls.title: Software process and device identification and authentication
controls.description: Identify and authenticate all software processes and devices.

controls.title: Account management
controls.description: Support management of all accounts by authorized users.

controls.title: Authenticator management
controls.description: Support management of authenticators (passwords, tokens, certificates).

controls.title: Strength of password-based authentication
controls.description: Enforce minimum password strength requirements.

controls.title: Use Control
controls.description: Enforce assigned privileges for actions on the system.

controls.title: Authorization enforcement
controls.description: Enforce assigned privileges for all entities.

controls.title: Wireless use control
controls.description: Protect wireless communications from unauthorized access.

controls.title: Mobile code
controls.description: Control the use of mobile code technologies.

controls.title: Session lock
controls.description: Prevent further access at the end of a configurable time period of inactivity.

controls.title: System Integrity
controls.description: Ensure the integrity of the IACS to prevent unauthorized manipulation.

controls.title: Communication integrity
controls.description: Protect the integrity of transmitted information.

controls.title: Malicious code protection
controls.description: Protect against, detect, report, and mitigate effects of malicious code.

controls.title: Security functionality verification
controls.description: Provide mechanisms to verify intended operation of security functions.

controls.title: Software and information integrity
controls.description: Detect, record, report, and protect against unauthorized changes to software.

controls.title: Input validation
controls.description: Validate the syntax and content of inputs.

controls.title: Deterministic output
controls.description: Provide deterministic output for defined error states.

controls.title: Data Confidentiality
controls.description: Ensure the confidentiality of information on communication channels and in data repositories.

controls.title: Information confidentiality
controls.description: Protect confidentiality of information at rest and in transit.

controls.title: Use of cryptography
controls.description: Use cryptographic mechanisms to protect confidentiality and integrity.

controls.title: Restricted Data Flow
controls.description: Segment the system through zones and conduits to limit unnecessary data flows.

controls.title: Network segmentation
controls.description: Segment networks through zones and conduits.

controls.title: Zone boundary protection
controls.description: Monitor and control communications at zone boundaries.

controls.title: Timely Response to Events
controls.description: Respond to security violations by notifying the proper authority and taking corrective action.

controls.title: Audit log accessibility
controls.description: Provide capability to access audit logs on a read-only basis.

controls.title: Continuous monitoring
controls.description: Provide capability for continuous monitoring of security-relevant events.

controls.title: Resource Availability
controls.description: Ensure the availability of the system against denial-of-service events.

controls.title: Denial of service protection
controls.description: Protect against denial-of-service attacks.

controls.title: Resource management
controls.description: Manage system resources to prevent resource exhaustion.

controls.title: Control system backup
controls.description: Backup the control system software and configuration.

controls.title: Control system recovery and reconstitution
controls.description: Recover and reconstitute the control system after a disruption.

changelog.change: Initial seed — 7 foundational requirements with 25 system requirements
changelog.author: emmanuelgjr
